title: AUDIENCE-ASK 3 + wrap the gift
prompt: Medium three-shot in the cozy anniversary living room — twinkling fairy lights, coffee table in foreground with the gift box on it. @Papa center, hands GENTLY PLACE the camera back in the box. @Sara at his left, hands HOLD the ribbon. @Eva at his right, tiny hand PATS the lid down. Wrapping together. Finished wrapped box on the coffee table. From the left, head turns toward camera with conspiratorial smile, finger over lips like 'shhh'. Sara (to camera): "What's the BEST gift YOU ever gave someone? Tell us!"
